goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 13:00'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free parking
Make sure you get whether they have internet and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 13:00
The train should leave on friday and should go to stansted airport
Make sure you get departure time
